name: canonical_contract
description: Canonical structure for a reviewed SaaS Master Service Agreement. parse_contract_pdf produces the text; extract_clauses normalizes it into this shape.
_TODO_step_4: Define the full canonical shape below. The `legal-solution` branch is the answer key.

Required: parties[], term_months, auto_renewal{present, notice_days}, liability_cap{present, basis, excludes_consequential}, indemnification{present, mutual}, termination{customer_for_convenience, notice_days}.
Also: effective_date, governing_law, payment_terms{net_days}, ip_assignment{present, assigns_to}, raw_clauses{}.
Keep this file valid JSON — the /api/schemas endpoint serves it as-is.

notice_days.description: TODO (Step 4): days of notice to prevent auto-renewal.

properties._TODO: Add term_months, indemnification{present,mutual}, termination{customer_for_convenience,notice_days}, payment_terms, ip_assignment, governing_law, effective_date, raw_clauses.
